item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Samurai's Journey I & II
item.description:
A compilation of the first two volumes of the detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned samurai─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level samurai to 70 and complete all job quests up through “The Battle on Bekko.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
